_publications._publicationTitle: Genetic modifiers of neurofibromatosis type 1-associated café-au-lait macule count identified using multi-platform analysis.

_contextSnippet: After filtering for the false discovery rate (FDR) <0.30, range of expression level >2, or >6, and biological significance, we identified candidate transcript-phenotype pairs for 80 genes
details: Successfully identified 80 candidate transcript-phenotype pairs after filtering for FDR <0.30, range of expression level >2 or >6, and biological significance
